text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Tamtam. I just spotted Rice rushing down the hall.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she wanted to do her costume fitting tonight. I already let the
dorm leaders know she'll be out past curfew.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That aside though, Creek. I tried followin' your advice, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Man is this whole wait-'n-watch thing rough. This'd all be so much
easier if I could help 'em.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I know the feeling. The two of us will have our work cut out for
us as real moms someday.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Welcome to my kingdom of the night! I-I'm a vampire, and...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: What are you doing, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Oh, um. Well, I wanted to...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I want to apologize in advance!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This might be unwarranted, and it might be a hassle, but still! I
really... I reaaally—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really want to help you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But you're not on the...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm not in the plans, and I always make things worse when I'm
around... but I can't bear to see you toiling away all alone!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, though, I'm not Rice! With this costume, I'm a super
powerful, reliable vampire!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If you reject my help, I'll drink your blood and force you to be my
friend! We're doing this together, whether you like it or not!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A costume...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Halloween is a day to dress up and dare to be someone else. You can
borrow the costume's power to say things you can't say yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I've made far too many miscalculations lately...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...If I put on a costume, could I be like someone else too?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I am not the Mihono Bourbon you know. I'm a ghost.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In order to help clear my cached regrets, I must ask you some
questions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was entrusted with a certain mission, and would like to complete the
related tasks perfectly. However, there is something I do not
understand...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Typically, when one accepts responsibility for a task, they are
expected to handle said task themself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But... what should I do if I find flaws in the party's initial task
distribution?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Is it too late to change them? Would accepting aid mean admitting
failure?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong with getting help. Working together will make
the party an even bigger success.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But if someone offers me help, doesn't that mean they've deemed me
unfit to complete the task myself?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: No, not at all! Everyone knows how capable you are!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The plans were made under the assumption that I would do my own
work, though. If others joined me, would it not affect their schedules?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-not as much as it would hurt us to see you overwork yourself. I think—no, I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: No more buts, okay?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You know, for a ghost... you're just like me, trying to hide how scared
you are.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And so, I want you to hear me out. I want to be your friend. I want to help you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And most of all, I don't want to see you stressed or worried... I want
you to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Then... would you mind helping me finish eating the broken
jack-o'-lanterns?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'd be glad to!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm a pretty big eater, you know!
And finally, the day of the Halloween Party arrives.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! What's that?! T-there's a hand, a zombie hand!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... What a lovely photo! Of you... and of your new ghoul
friend!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like this year's party is a roaring success.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We've still got plenty of spooky tricks up our sleeve! Right, Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. Attention, prop team. I will now press the switch.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Okay! Ready whenever!

text_block_list.name: Fog Machine
text_block_list.text: BEEP! Pssshhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Aaaah!

text_block_list.name: Vacuum
text_block_list.text: Fssshhh...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As demonstrated, we have plenty of surprises planned to entertain
guests like you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Everyone brainstormed them together. Hehehe! I even helped
a little too.

text_block_list.name: Student
text_block_list.text: Tremble...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh. That girl over there is all by herself...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Chomp!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I just used my powers to turn you into a vampire like me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
How about you go turn that girl too? Once you're bitten... you can
turn anyone into another vampire friend!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I bet there are a whole bunch of people here who would love to be friends
with you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, the changing rooms are this way. Don't worry if you didn't
apply for a costume—we brought all kinds of spares.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hm, looks like there's no one left in line for guidance, so I'm gonna
zip out and suit up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey Bourbon! You got the party zone lookin' real snappy! The
whole dorm's been real coordinated, thanks to how hard you've been
workin'.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
About that—I have something to say. I know I caused you plenty of
the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Not this again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you, Tamamo. I am deeply grateful for all the assistance and
advice you provided.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha, ya know what? You're cuter when ya smile. And sorry for bein' a
busybody. Now, I've gotta hurry and get Halloweened up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Happy Halloween, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I hope you all have a magical evening, and that you get to spend it
"letting loose" with friends.
